calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting , Report, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Garry Cohen, via Zoom, for John Robert Harper, Trustee.

Counsel offers testimony in support of the accounting petition. There is discussion regarding the Trustee's history with this matter and of distributing the remaining funds to the Trustee and terminating the trust. The court advises of its tentative ruling to accept but not approve most of the requests in the petition. Counsel submits.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of 9th Account
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Nov-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Cohen for John Harper.

Mr. Cohen stated that he is requesting that the funds be distributed to the Current Trustee and that the Trustee will manage the funds for his Brother. The Court raised the issue of having the money deposited into a blocked account. Mr. Cohen stated that having a blocked account would cost more money, that the Brother has been taking care of Mr. Rork for fourteen years, that the funds have dwindled down to about $19,000.00, that bank fees are occurring because the Bank requires a minimum balance of $25,000.00, that they make withdrawals once a month and sometimes twice a month, that having to come in for approval to withdraw the funds from the blocked account would still incur costs in Attorney fees and that the cost of the bond is also something that can be done away with. The Seventh Account and Report, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.
